inputs.label: Good Parts Produced
inputs.businessContext: Number of defect-free parts produced during the planned production time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of defect-free parts produced during the planned production time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Planlanan üretim süresinde üretilen hatasız parça sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der fehlerfreien Teile, die während der geplanten Produktionszeit hergestellt wurden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de pièces sans défaut produites pendant le temps de production prévu.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de piezas sin defectos producidas durante el tiempo de producción planificado.

inputs.label: Total Parts Produced
inputs.businessContext: Total parts produced including defective ones.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total parts produced including defective ones.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hatalı olanlar dahil üretilen toplam parça sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der produzierten Teile einschließlich Ausschuss.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de pièces produites, y compris les défectueuses.
businessContext_i18n.es: Total de piezas producidas, incluyendo las defectuosas.

inputs.label: Ideal Cycle Time
inputs.businessContext: The theoretical fastest time to produce one part.

businessContext_i18n.en: The theoretical fastest time to produce one part.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir parçayı üretmek için teorik en hızlı süre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die theoretisch schnellste Zeit zur Herstellung eines Teils.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le temps théorique le plus rapide pour produire une pièce.
businessContext_i18n.es: El tiempo teórico más rápido para producir una pieza.

inputs.label: Planned Production Time
inputs.businessContext: Total scheduled production time for the shift or period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total scheduled production time for the shift or period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vardiya veya dönem için planlanan toplam üretim süresi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte geplante Produktionszeit für die Schicht oder den Zeitraum.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps de production total prévu pour le poste ou la période.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo total de producción programado para el turno o período.

inputs.label: Total Downtime
inputs.businessContext: Unplanned and planned stoppages during the planned production time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Unplanned and planned stoppages during the planned production time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Planlanan üretim süresi içindeki plansız ve planlı duruşlar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ungeplante und geplante Stillstände während der geplanten Produktionszeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Arrêts non planifiés et planifiés pendant le temps de production prévu.
businessContext_i18n.es: Paradas no planificadas y planificadas durante el tiempo de producción planificado.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
